positions.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.getPositions().then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r.map(function(pos){return{symbol:pos.symbol,size:pos.size,entryPrice:pos.entryPrice,unrealizedPnl:pos.unrealizedPnl,marginUsed:pos.marginUsed,leverage:pos.leverage}}))})})()

account.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.getAccountState().then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})()

oracle-price.description: Oracle price for first MYX pool
oracle-price.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.getMarketDataWithPrices().then(function(r){if(!r.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no markets'});return JSON.stringify({symbol:r[0].symbol,price:r[0].price})})})()

pre-trade.description: Snapshot: position count + account balances (before trade)

post-trade.description: Snapshot: position count + account balances (after trade, same shape as pre-trade)

orders.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.getOpenOrders().then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})()

place-order.description: Place a market buy on first MYX market ($150 notional, 2x leverage)
place-order.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.getMarketDataWithPrices().then(function(markets){if(!markets.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX markets'});var m=markets[0];var price=parseFloat(m.price.replace(/[^0-9.]/g,''));var size=String(150/price);return p.placeOrder({symbol:m.symbol,isBuy:true,orderType:'market',size:size,leverage:2,usdAmount:'150',maxSlippageBps:500,currentPrice:price}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()

close-position.description: Close first open MYX position (full close)
close-position.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.getPositions().then(function(positions){if(!positions.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX positions'});var pos=positions[0];return p.closePosition({symbol:pos.symbol,size:pos.size}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()

close-all-positions.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.closePositions({closeAll:true}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})()

cancel-order.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.getOpenOrders().then(function(orders){if(!orders.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX open orders'});var o=orders[0];return p.cancelOrder({orderId:o.orderId,symbol:o.symbol}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()

cancel-all-orders.description: Batch cancel all open MYX orders
cancel-all-orders.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.getOpenOrders().then(function(orders){if(!orders.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX open orders'});return p.cancelOrders({orders:orders.map(function(o){return{orderId:o.orderId,symbol:o.symbol}})}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()

update-tpsl.description: Set TP/SL on first MYX position (TP=+10%, SL=-5% from entry)
update-tpsl.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.getPositions().then(function(positions){if(!positions.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX positions'});var pos=positions[0];var entry=parseFloat(pos.entryPrice);var tp=String(entry*1.10);var sl=String(entry*0.95);return p.updatePositionTPSL({symbol:pos.symbol,takeProfitPrice:tp,stopLossPrice:sl}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()

add-margin.description: Add $10 margin to first MYX position
add-margin.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.getPositions().then(function(positions){if(!positions.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX positions'});var pos=positions[0];return p.updateMargin({symbol:pos.symbol,amount:'10'}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()

edit-order.description: Edit first open MYX order (update price by +1%)
edit-order.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.getOpenOrders().then(function(orders){if(!orders.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX open orders'});var o=orders[0];var newPrice=String(parseFloat(o.price)*1.01);return p.editOrder({orderId:o.orderId,newOrder:{symbol:o.symbol,isBuy:o.side==='buy',orderType:o.isTrigger?'stop':'limit',size:o.size,price:newPrice}}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()

fills.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.getOrderFills().then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})()

fees.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.getMarketDataWithPrices().then(function(markets){if(!markets.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX markets'});var m=markets[0];return p.calculateFees({amount:'1000',orderType:'market',symbol:m.symbol}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()

validate-order-small.description: MYX validateOrder with $5 order (expect invalid — below per-pool min ~$11)
validate-order-small.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.getMarketDataWithPrices().then(function(markets){if(!markets.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX markets'});var m=markets[0];return p.validateOrder({symbol:m.symbol,isBuy:true,orderType:'market',size:'0.01',leverage:2,usdAmount:'5',currentPrice:parseFloat(m.price)}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()

validate-order-valid.description: MYX validateOrder with valid $150 order (expect valid — above per-pool min)
validate-order-valid.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.getMarketDataWithPrices().then(function(markets){if(!markets.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX markets'});var m=markets[0];return p.validateOrder({symbol:m.symbol,isBuy:true,orderType:'market',size:'0.07',leverage:10,usdAmount:'150',currentPrice:parseFloat(m.price)}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()
